name: Chameleon
description: Monitor Chameleon product adoption platform for access and user data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Chameleon at https://app.chameleon.io
2. Go to Settings → API
3. Copy your Account Secret
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Account Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Chameleon Dashboard → Settings → API
